name: mediapaste
description: Upload images dropped or pasted into TinyMCE directly to the REDAXO mediapool

scripts.build-copy: mkdir -p ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/mediapaste/ ../../assets/scripts/tinymce/plugins/mediapaste/ && mkdir -p ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/ && cp -r dist/mediapaste/ ../../assets/vendor/tinymce/plugins/mediapaste/

author: FriendsOfREDAXO
